chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-955 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 24-01-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On most of the dates learned counsel for the petitioner has remained absent despite last chance given. Today also he is not present and Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar is holding brief on his behalf but is not ready to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
